steps.label: Run result review
steps.stdout:
Result review written: C:\Betting\Soccer Stats\docs\agent-system\outputs\model_result_review_current.md
CSV: C:\Betting\Soccer Stats\docs\agent-system\outputs\model_result_review_current.csv
settled_market_rows=1490 weak_spots=12 top_action=Persist model probabilities per market in match_data.json so the review agent can compare confidence bands to actual hit rate.
